author: Liu Lu, ed.
title: Jingpozu yuyan jianzhi (Jingpoyu) [Brief description of the Jingpo language of the Jingpo people]
notes: Distinct from Jingpozu yuyan jianzhi (Zaiwa).  Body-parts entered include animal parts, some verbs, and other scattered terms.  Not represented in ZMYYC or TBL so should be entered in full.
